summary: Iteration 228 — Evidence Gate Engine (Fase B) Testing Complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (1 skipped - no EN_13241 ramo). Frontend: All UI features verified. Evidence Gate engine correctly evaluates emissions based on branch_flags (saldatura_attiva, zincatura_esterna) and normative requirements.

issues: Minor: HTML nesting warning in console (<tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>) from React dev tools overlay - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Used existing test session: test_session_rami_normativi_227. Existing data: commessa com_e8c4810ad476, ramo ramo_96d7f4219812 (EN_1090 with saldatura_attiva=true, zincatura_esterna=true), ramo ramo_b5c133e2a6e9 (GENERICA), emissions em_0effb0357e67 (D01) and em_65e0c1bf6fbd (L01).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Evidence Gate Fase B fully working. Key features tested: EN 1090 with saldatura_attiva=true requires WPS_WPQR, WELDER_QUALIFICATION, WELDING_REGISTER. EN 1090 with zincatura_esterna=true requires SUBCONTRACT_DOC. GENERICA has minimal checks (scope only) + GENERIC_NO_DOP_CE warning. Emission without scope is blocked with EMISSION_SCOPE_MISSING. completion_percent excludes not_applicable checks. POST /emetti returns 409 with blockers when gate fails. Snapshot cache fields (last_gate_status, last_gate_check_at, last_completion_percent, last_blockers_count) are saved after gate check.

EN1090_saldatura_WPS_required.details: WPS_WPQR check is required=true when saldatura_attiva=true, blocks emission if missing

EN1090_saldatura_welder_required.details: WELDER_QUALIFICATION check is required=true when saldatura_attiva=true

EN1090_saldatura_register_required.details: WELDING_REGISTER check is required=true when saldatura_attiva=true

EN1090_zincatura_subcontract_required.details: SUBCONTRACT_DOC check is required=true when zincatura_esterna=true, blocks emission if missing

emission_scope_missing_blocks.details: Emission without scope (no batch/ddt/line/voce) is blocked with EMISSION_SCOPE_MISSING

completion_percent_excludes_not_applicab.details: completion_percent only counts required checks, excludes not_applicable from denominator

gate_output_format_checks.details: checks[] array has code/status/required/message for each check

gate_output_format_blockers.details: blockers[] array has code/message for each blocker

gate_output_format_warnings.details: warnings[] array has code/message for each warning

GENERICA_minimal_checks.details: GENERICA only requires scope check + branch status, no EN 1090 specific checks

emetti_blocked_409.details: POST /emetti returns 409 when emission is blocked with blockers detail

emetti_recalculates_gate.details: POST /emetti recalculates gate before attempting to emit

snapshot_cache_fields.details: Emission has last_gate_status, last_gate_check_at, last_completion_percent, last_blockers_count after gate check

EN1090_all_checks_present.details: EN 1090 gate has all 13 expected checks (EMISSION_SCOPE, BRANCH_STATUS, EMISSION_NOT_ISSUED, MATERIAL_BATCHES, CERT_31, WPS_WPQR, WELDER_QUALIFICATION, WELDING_REGISTER, VT_INSPECTION, FINAL_CONTROL, TECHNICAL_REVIEW, SUBCONTRACT_DOC, TOOLING_STATUS)

frontend_3_column_layout.details: EmissioneDetailPanel shows 3 columns: Cosa serve | Cosa c'e | Cosa manca

frontend_progress_bar.details: Progress bar with % and color coding (red<50, amber<80, green>=80)

frontend_blockers_warnings_visible.details: Blockers and warnings sections visible with codes and messages

frontend_link_buttons.details: Link buttons (collega) present for linkable missing checks

frontend_emetti_button_hidden_when_block.details: Emetti button not visible when emission is blocked (emittable=false)

frontend_click_emission_opens_detail.details: Clicking on emission in list opens EmissioneDetailPanel
